narrative:
Elyria City has 32,789 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.9 percentage points.
